subject: SOCDS 2025/26 Update Week #25 - PreK Orange
text:
Email Ms. Annemarie
Thank you
Thank you to everyone for your patience with us and the snow. We have attempted to reschedule any conferences that were missed. Please let me know if you still need to schedule a conference (and share some available times) or if you would like a follow-up meeting. We value your partnership.
March Monday Madness
Crazy Sock Day
Every Monday in March, we will celebrate the joy of reading by connecting stories to our clothing and appearance. Many of the stories are inspired by Dr. Seuss and Read Across America.
This Monday, we will celebrate
Crazy Sock Day
(
Fox in Socks
). Some children may wear socks on their hands, some may wear them over their pants, and others may choose fun, non-matching socks.
Clothing
Outdoor Wear and Change of Clothes
Our playground is still covered with snow, but with the potential for warmer weather this weekend, it will likely turn into a mud pit. Please continue to send your child in snow boots and snow pants so they stay warm and dry.
In addition, please consider sending an extra change of clothing, as many children have grown.
SEPAC Resources Fair
The Special Education Parent Advisory Committee (SEPAC) is presenting its annual Inclusive Resource Fair this weekend.
There will be providers, groups, and organizations from the local area. You will be able to learn more about the inclusive opportunities, activities, and services they offer for individuals with disabilities.
Statements Sent
I sent the next installment of tuition for Weeks #25-#28, February 23rd-March 20th.  These were sent directly from QuickBooks if you didn't receive it, or if I made an error, please let me know.
If you need a tax statement for 2025, please let me know.  Our tax id is 26-1420950.
If you 
have any questions or concerns, please call or text
646-226-8790
or email
learn@socds.com
.
Annemarie
South Orange Country Day School
461 Vose Avenue, South Orange
973.762.6451
You are receiving this email because your child attends SOCDS.  If you no longer wish to receive these updates, please unsubscribe below.
